mdSummary:
# Delta

Trend indicator showing delta value with up/down arrow + color.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Dashboard
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/delta

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Delta | Value | `double` | `` |  |
| Delta | Format | `DeltaFormat` | `DeltaFormat.Percent` |  |
| Delta | Positive | `DeltaDirection` | `DeltaDirection.Good` |  |
| Delta | ShowArrow | `bool` | `true` |  |
| Delta | Culture | `System.Globalization.CultureInfo?` | `` | Overrides CurrentCulture for number formatting (decimal separator, group separator). Leave null to honour ASP.NET request localization — a de-DE user sees +12,5% while an en-US user sees +12.5%. |
| Delta | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Delta | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
